    • Understanding the NFTab Specification

Build a matched reference cohort by exact column matching

nf_matched_cohort.Rd

Returns the subset of x where observation columns exactly match the provided values. Intended for use as the .ref argument in nf_compare.

Usage

nf_matched_cohort(x, match_on)

Arguments

x

An nftab object providing the reference pool.

match_on

Named list: column name -> one or more allowed values.

Value

An nftab containing only the matching observations.

On this page
